narrative:
Harrison Township (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,020 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.0 percentage points.
